name: CMP_TCS_STMT_VL
query: SELECT STMT.STMT_ID, STMT.EE_PROFILE_ID, STMT.STAT_CD, STMT_TL.NAME, STMT_TL.DESCRIPTION, STMT.INDICATE_ESTIMATE_FLAG, STMT.STMT_GENERATED_FLAG, STMT_TL.SMRY_DESC_TXT, STMT.HIDE_SMRY_DESC_TXT_FLAG, STMT.SMRY_DESC_TXT_ORDR_NUM, STMT.HIDE_SMRY_FLAG, STMT_TL.SMRY_TITLE, STMT_TL.SMRY_ADDL_INFO_TITLE, STMT_TL.SMRY_ADDL_INFO, STMT.HIDE_SMRY_ADDL_INFO_FLAG, STMT.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, STMT_TL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID BUSINESS_GROUP_ID2, STMT.CREATED_BY, STMT.CREATION_DATE, STMT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STMT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STMT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STMT.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STMT.PDF_LOCAL_CURR_FLAG, STMT.PDF_LOCAL_CURR_AVLBL, STMT.PDF_OTHER_CURR_FLAG, STMT.PDF_OTHER_CURR_CODE, STMT.PDF_OTHER_CURR_AVLBL, STMT.CURR_SWITCHER_DEFAULT, STMT.HIDE_PDF_ITEM_DETAILS_FLAG, STMT.HIDE_OL_DRILL_SECTIONS_FLAG, STMT.DISPLAY_JOB_FLAG, STMT.DISPLAY_POSITION_FLAG, STMT.DISPLAY_SALARY_FLAG FROM CMP_TCS_STMT STMT, CMP_TCS_STMT_TL STMT_TL WHERE STMT.STMT_ID = STMT_TL.STMT_ID AND STMT_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND STMT.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = STMT_TL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
